compiled_state.title: Add --auto Mode section to architect-foundation SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Add a new '--auto Mode' section to plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md immediately after the Usage block.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md (add --auto Mode section)

## TDD Requirement
testing_mode: GREEN
Depends on task e644-1a2a. Makes these RED tests pass:
- test_auto_flag_support (greps '--auto')
- test_auto_recommended_defaults (greps 'recommend.*default')
- test_auto_graceful_missing (greps 'actionable.*error')

## Implementation
Add the following section immediately after the Usage/invocation block (before Phase 0):

```
## --auto Mode

When invoked as /dso:architect-foundation --auto:

1. **Skip Phase 1 Socratic dialogue** — do not ask any questions from the Question Bank
2. **Select recommended defaults** for all scaffolding decisions based on the project-understanding.md analysis
3. **Proceed directly to Phase 2** with the selected defaults
4. **Report selected defaults** in a summary table before generating artifacts so the user can see what was chosen
5. **Graceful error**: If project-understanding.md is missing or incomplete, emit an actionable error message listing which fields are needed (do not silently proceed with assumptions)
```

## Verification
Run: grep -qiE -- '--auto' plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md && echo PASS
Run: grep -qiE 'recommend.*default' plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md && echo PASS
Run: grep -qiE 'actionable.*error' plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md && echo PASS
